app.title: MangaZen
app.description: Read and share your favourite manga

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to vote, save favourites, and follow your manga.
auth.registerSubtitle: Register to vote on manga, save favourites, and join the community.
auth.errorMissingCredentials: Enter your email and password to continue.
auth.errorUserNotFound: We couldn't find an account with that email.
auth.errorUserExists: That account already exists. Sign in with your email.
auth.successRegistered: Account created successfully. You can sign in now.
auth.errorInvalidRegisterData: Enter your name, email, and a password of at least 6 characters.

home.welcomeSubtitle: Read manga, manhwa and manhua in your language. Track your progress, support scanlation teams and join the community.
home.metaTitle: MangaZen — Read manga, manhwa and manhua in English
home.metaDescription: The best platform to read manga, manhwa and manhua in English. Explore thousands of titles with a clean reading experience.

boost.panelSubtitle: Feature your manga on the Home for a limited time.
boost.empty: You don’t have manga to promote yet.

errors.notOwner: You can only boost your own manga.

donation.externalLinkHint: Paste a valid link (https://…). Leave empty to remove it.

donationLinks.empty: You don't have any donation links yet.
donationLinks.errorMaxLinks: You've reached the maximum of {max} links.
donationLinks.errorPlatformExists: You already have a link for that platform.
donationLinks.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.loginPrompt: Sign in to view your library and reading progress.
profile.zenPointsGranted: +{amount} Zen Shards credited to your account
profile.noBadges: You do not have badges yet.
profile.librarySubtitle: Organise your manga by reading status.
profile.libraryEmpty: No manga in this category yet. Visit a manga and choose a reading status.
profile.libraryInProgressEmpty: No in-progress reads yet. Open a chapter and your position will save automatically.
profile.claimWhitelistHint: When verification finishes, use the button above to claim your reward.
profile.adblockDisabled: Thanks for supporting MangaZen by browsing without Adblock.
profile.adblockEnabled: Adblock is enabled. If you can, please disable it to support the platform.
profile.whitelistBadgeActive: You already earned the Community Pillar badge. Thanks for supporting MangaZen.
profile.whitelistCongrats: Congratulations, {name}! You earned the Community Pillar badge and 50 Zen Shards for supporting MangaZen without Adblock.
profile.globalAdblockBanner: We noticed you're using Adblock. On MangaZen adverts stay light and help scan teams. If you disable it for this site, you can earn 50 Zen Shards and an exclusive badge from your profile.
profile.globalAdblockBannerAria: Notice about supporting MangaZen without Adblock
profile.usernameInvite: Choose a username to get a short, memorable public profile URL.
profile.usernameHint: Unaccented letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only. Between 3 and 20 characters.

usernameError.USERNAME_INVALID: Use 3–20 characters: letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only.

profile.metaDescription: Manage your account, library, badges and Zen currency.
profile.libraryEmptyAll: Your library is empty. Start reading to track your progress here.
profile.libraryEmptyReading: You're not reading any manga right now.
profile.libraryEmptyCompleted: You haven't completed any manga yet.
profile.libraryEmptyPlanToRead: Your plan to read list is empty.

chapterComments.title: Chapter comments
chapterComments.loginPrompt: Sign in to comment and vote.
chapterComments.empty: No comments on this chapter yet.

reader.localeChangeDialogDialectBody: The next chapter is in {locale}. Do you want to continue?
reader.localeChangeDialogDifferentLanguageBody: The next chapter is in a different language ({locale}).
reader.emptyChapterBody: It looks like this chapter doesn't have any images yet. Go back to the manga page and try another chapter.

readerChapterEnd.noNextBody: There are no more published chapters. Return to the series page to keep exploring.

earlyAccess.countdown: Free for everyone in {days} days, {hours} h, {minutes} min
earlyAccess.opening: This chapter is opening up to everyone…
earlyAccess.balance: Your balance: {points} Zen Coins / Zen Shards
earlyAccess.loginPrompt: Sign in to spend Zen-Points and read now, or wait until it’s free.
earlyAccess.insufficientZen: Not enough Zen Coins or Zen Shards.
earlyAccess.reauthHint: Confirm your password to spend Zen-Points.
earlyAccess.listBadgeHasAccess: Early access: you can read this chapter
earlyAccess.listBadgeLocked: Early access: free for everyone on {date}
earlyAccess.scanToggle: Early access (Premium or Zen Shards unlock)
earlyAccess.scanHint: 3–30 days. Price between 10 and 500 Zen Shards (default 50).
earlyAccess.invalidDays: Duration must be between 3 and 30 days.
earlyAccess.invalidPrice: Price must be between 10 and 500 Zen-Points.

admin.title: Early access — chapters
admin.subtitle: Enable or edit early access for any chapter.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: A space for readers, teams, and creators.

creatorRequest.title: Request Creator role
creatorRequest.body: The Creator role is for independent authors publishing original manga or comics on MangaZen. It gives you the same Scan panel as scanlation teams to upload chapters, manage your submissions, and add new titles.
creatorRequest.loginCta: Sign in to send your request.
creatorRequest.pendingMessage: We already have your request under review. We will let you know when there is news.
creatorRequest.successMessage: Request sent. An admin will review it soon.
creatorRequest.errorPending: You already have a request in review.
creatorRequest.errorForbidden: Your account cannot send this request.
creatorRequest.errorGeneric: Could not send. Please try again later.
creatorRequest.alreadyCreator: You already have the Creator role. You can open the Scan panel from the user menu.
creatorRequest.staffSkip: Moderation roles do not use this form.
creatorRequest.toastApproved: Your Creator role request was approved!
creatorRequest.toastRejected: Your Creator role request was not approved.

rankings.title: Rankings
rankings.subtitle: Readers, supporters, and scan teams contributing the most.
rankings.empty: No data for this ranking yet.
rankings.emptyDescription: There is not enough activity yet to display this ranking.

community.metaDescription: Join the MangaZen community. Rankings, feedback, manga requests and more.

feedback.boardSubtitle: Report bugs, suggest improvements, or share praise. The team reads everything — highest scored items surface first.
feedback.boardScopeHint: This space is for bugs, suggestions, and praise about MangaZen. To ask for a specific manga to be added, use the request form below.
feedback.empty: No feedback yet. Be the first to share an idea.
feedback.adminDeleteDialogDescription: This will permanently delete «{title}». This cannot be undone.
feedback.loadMoreError: Could not load more entries. Please try again.

mangaRequest.title: Request a manga
mangaRequest.subtitle: Suggest a title you’d like to see on MangaZen. The team reviews requests in order; you’ll get a notification when your request is approved or declined.
mangaRequest.fieldNotes: Why do you want this manga? (optional)
mangaRequest.adultRestrictionWarning: Important: Adult (+18) material is strictly prohibited on this platform (Hentai / explicit content). Requests of this type will be rejected and removed.
mangaRequest.loginCta: Sign in or register to request a manga.
mangaRequest.limitReached: You already have three pending requests. Wait for them to be reviewed before sending another.
mangaRequest.submitError: Could not send the request. Try again.
mangaRequest.emptyList: You haven’t submitted any requests yet.
mangaRequest.adminSubtitle: Pending requests from readers. Approving or rejecting notifies the user.

header.title: Scan panel
header.subtitle: Upload chapters, track your submissions, and add new series.

tabs.unsavedWarning: You have unsaved changes in the upload form. Are you sure you want to leave?

stats.heading: Statistics
stats.zenDisclaimer: Zen-Points in the period are estimated from views (placeholder until a transaction ledger exists).
stats.statusSubtitle: Counts are for your chapter submissions.
stats.emptyTopChapters: No read data for your chapters yet.

upload.heading: Upload chapter
upload.hint: Pick a catalogue title, chapter number, and pages (images or ZIP). Submissions stay pending until reviewed.
upload.mangaSearchPlaceholder: Type at least 2 characters of the title…
upload.reorderHint: Drag thumbnails to reorder. Order is kept on upload.
upload.pickManga: Select a manga from the list.
upload.startsWithSinglePageLabel: First page alone in double-page spread
upload.startsWithSinglePageTooltip: Turn this on if the chapter begins with a single cover page. Turn it off if the first two-page spread starts at page 1.

myUploads.heading: My uploads
myUploads.empty: You have not uploaded any chapters yet.
myUploads.emptyDescription: Submit a chapter from the Upload tab to see it listed here.

newManga.heading: Add new manga
newManga.hint: Fill in the details and cover. The series will be linked to your account.
newManga.title: Title
newManga.author: Author

errors.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.ZIP_IMAGES: The ZIP has no valid images or too many pages.
errors.INVALID_COVER: Cover is not a valid image.
errors.INVALID_TAG_IDS: One or more tags do not exist.
errors.ZIP_TOO_LARGE: The compressed ZIP is too large for your plan.
errors.ZIP_INVALID: The file is not a valid ZIP.
errors.ZIP_DECOMPRESSED_LIMIT: Uncompressed ZIP contents exceed the allowed limit.
errors.INVALID_IMAGE: An image is not valid JPEG, PNG, or WEBP.
errors.IMAGE_TOO_LARGE: An image exceeds the maximum size for your plan.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many searches. Try again in a few seconds.

shell.updateUserError: Could not update the user. Try again.

errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission for this action.
errors.REAUTH_REQUIRED: Check your password and try again.

shell.userSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, email or username...
shell.scanRoleDialogBody1: By accepting this role, the user declares they are the owner or have express authorization to upload and distribute the content they publish on MangaZen.
shell.scanRoleDialogBody2: MangaZen is not responsible for copyright infringement or other legal issues arising from content uploaded by this user.
shell.scanRoleDialogBody3: Failure to comply with these conditions may result in suspension or deletion of the account and published content.
shell.scanRoleDialogConfirm: I understand and confirm the role change

ads.title: Advertising
ads.subtitle: Manage ad scripts by slot.
ads.scriptPlaceholder: Paste your ad network script here...

scanStats.title: Scan & creator statistics
scanStats.subtitle: Global ranking of users with SCAN or CREATOR roles, uploads, and reading reach (progress last chapter).
scanStats.listEmpty: No scan or creator users match your filters.
scanStats.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, username, or email…
scanStats.pendingEmpty: No pending chapters for this user.

pendingMangas.title: Manga pending review
pendingMangas.subtitle: Works uploaded from the Scan panel that are not yet approved for the public catalogue.
pendingMangas.allClearDescription: There are no manga pending review.
pendingMangas.rejectReasonPlaceholder: e.g. does not meet community guidelines…
pendingMangas.toastApproved: Manga approved and visible in the catalogue.

pendingChapters.title: Chapters pending review
pendingChapters.subtitle: Scan uploads awaiting approval before they appear in the public catalogue.
pendingChapters.allClearDescription: There are no chapters pending review.
pendingChapters.toastApproved: Chapter approved and visible to readers.

creatorRequests.title: Creator role requests
creatorRequests.subtitle: Review and approve or reject requests from users who want to publish their own work.
creatorRequests.toastApproved: Request approved. The user is now a Creator.

userBadges.none: This user has no badges assigned.
userBadges.revokeConfirm: Remove the badge "{badgeName}" from this user?
userBadges.revokeDialogDescription: Remove the badge "{badgeName}" from this user? This cannot be undone.

header.title: Control Panel — MangaZen
header.subtitle: Manage users, roles, Zen currency and badges.

globalBanner.title: Global Message
globalBanner.subtitle: Send a message that appears on all pages for all users.
globalBanner.messagePlaceholder: Write a message for all users...
globalBanner.confirmQuestion: Are you sure you want to send this message to all users?

moderation.usersSubtitle: Ban, suspend or delete users who violate the rules.
moderation.reasonPlaceholder: Describe the reason for the sanction...

badges.catalogSubtitle: Create custom badges or remove them from the catalogue (users lose the link, not their history elsewhere).

triggerType.ZEN_POINTS_SPENT: Zen Coins spent (approx., no ledger yet)

badges.catalogDeleteConfirm: Delete badge "{name}" from the catalogue and unlink it from all users?
badges.catalogDeleteDialogDescription: Delete badge "{name}" from the catalogue and unlink it from all users? This cannot be undone.

badgeDescriptions.pilar_de_la_comunidad: You disabled ad blocker. Thank you for supporting MangaZen.
badgeDescriptions.primera_pagina: You saved your first reading position in a chapter.
badgeDescriptions.explorador_de_estanterias: You read chapters from 5 different manga.
badgeDescriptions.viajero_de_mundos: You read chapters from 20 different manga.
badgeDescriptions.primera_voz: You left your first comment on a chapter.
badgeDescriptions.corazon_manga: You added your first manga to favorites.
badgeDescriptions.pulgar_arriba_zen: You liked a chapter for the first time.
badgeDescriptions.buho_mangazen: Night reader: you saved progress between 0:00 and 4:59.
badgeDescriptions.plan_maestro: You added 10 manga to your reading list.
badgeDescriptions.mecenas_mangazen: You made your first ZenCoins purchase.

security.ipRadarNote: Your session ends automatically if we detect access from a different location. Using a VPN can cause unexpected logouts.
security.hideFromRankingsDescription: When enabled, your account will not appear in community reader, donor, or scan rankings.
security.requirePasswordDescription: Actions that add or remove Zen Coins will ask for your password when this is on.
security.requireEmailCodeLabel: Email code for sensitive account changes
security.requireEmailCodeDescription: Changing email or password will require a verification code from your email when those flows are enabled.
security.disablePasswordWarningBody: Without this, anyone using your logged-in session could change Zen Coins without entering your password again.
security.disableEmailCodeWarningBody: Without this, sensitive account changes may be easier if someone else uses your session.
security.revokeAllConfirmDetail: This ends every active session for your account. You will need to sign in again on this device.
security.revokeAllError: Could not end all sessions. Try again.

errors.INVALID_JSON: The request could not be read. Try again.

security.loginReasonIpChange: We closed your session because your network location changed. Avoid VPNs if you see this often.
security.loginReasonAllSessionsRevoked: You signed out on all devices. Sign in again to continue.
security.reauthModalHint: This extra step protects your account.
security.privacySectionHint: Control what signed-in users see on your public profile. Guests without an account only see your name and avatar.
security.isProfilePublicDescription: When off, other logged-in users only see that your profile is private (name and avatar).
security.hideZenFromPublicDescription: Hides your Zen balance from visitors who can see your full profile.
security.hideFavoritesFromPublicDescription: Hides your favourite manga list from visitors.
security.hideReadingStatsFromPublicLabel: Hide reading stats on public profile
security.hideReadingStatsFromPublicDescription: Hides reading status counts and “most read” stats from visitors.

publicProfile.guestCtaBody: Sign in or create an account to see this member’s full profile, badges, and activity.
publicProfile.privateBody: This member has chosen to keep their profile private. Only their name and avatar are visible.

currency.insufficientCoins: You don't have enough Zen Coins.
currency.insufficientShards: You don't have enough Zen Shards.
currency.shardsNotAllowedCreatorEa: Zen Shards can only unlock Early Access from scans.
currency.txHistorySubtitle: Latest 20 currency movements in your account.

presence.footerOnline: {count, plural, one {# user online} other {# users online}}

catalog.libraryNoResults: We couldn’t find manga with those filters.
catalog.mangaChaptersEmptyLocale: No chapters in your language yet.
catalog.mangaDetailSynopsisEmpty: This manga doesn’t have a synopsis yet. We’ll add more details soon.
catalog.mangaAuthWallBody: Sign in or create an account to save your reading status.

news.metaDescription: Latest news, new chapters and MangaZen announcements.
news.pageSubtitle: Announcements, new chapters and latest additions.

billing.metaDescription: Buy Zen Coins to support your favorite scans and unlock exclusive content.
billing.pageSubtitle: Support scans, unlock Early Access and more.
billing.successBody: Your Zen Coins have been credited. It may take a few seconds to reflect.
billing.cancelledMessage: You cancelled the payment. You can try again whenever you're ready.
billing.errorNotConfigured: Payment system is not configured yet. Check back soon.
billing.errorGeneric: An error occurred while processing your payment. Please try again.
billing.securityNote: Payments are securely processed by Lemon Squeezy. MangaZen does not store card details.

moderation.bannedTitle: Your account has been permanently banned
moderation.bannedBody: Your account was banned for violating MangaZen's terms of use. If you believe this is an error, please contact support.
moderation.suspendedBody: Your account has been temporarily suspended. You cannot access content until the suspension ends.

navbar.searchNoResultsDescription: We couldn't find any manga with that name.
